title: The Problem with AI Agents No One is Talking About | Yutori, Abhishek Das
summary: Abhishek Das, co-founder of Yutori, argues that most AI agents fail in production because the industry has normalized unreliability. Error compounding across multi-step workflows makes agents with 90% per-step accuracy fundamentally broken, and building reliable agents requires prioritizing robustness over raw performance.
